# Source: npm/node_modules/date-fns/src/isAfter/index.js (representative snippet)
# Legitimate date comparison — both operands are runtime values, not future literals.
function isAfter(dirtyDate, dirtyDateToCompare) {
  var date = toDate(dirtyDate);
  var compare = toDate(dirtyDateToCompare);
  return date.getTime() > compare.getTime();
}
